creator: petef@databits.net
text:
Modify LIB_DEPEND to install mail/cclient for the cclient library instead
of mail/imap-uw.  Minor cosmetic changes to pkg-plist (add WWW: and author
name/email), and MAINTAINER update (old MAINTAINER email is bouncing).

Fix: WWW: http://hex.databits.net/~petef/diffs/tkrat.diff
How-To-Repeat:
